标题: CH Croix Heart Cross Logo Jeans, featuring custom dark horizontal bamboo pattern cotton denim fabric with black leather cross patch as a focal point, exuding a wild and untamed touch in every inch. The leather patch at the back waistband and pocket logo metal tag sway slightly with body movement, adding a sense of dynamism and vitality. Prioritizing original denim material, the fabric undergoes processes such as snowballing, salting, and special solution treatment, with the addition of dye to soak and absorb the solvent, followed by washing and drying to further fade and oxidize. Sanding and hand rubbing techniques are used to naturally fade and distress the denim surface, while manual tools create physical damage to enhance its original texture and detail, adding uniqueness. Combining rubbing and painting techniques, specific areas are hand-rubbed to achieve natural crease effects, with textured cat whiskers drawn using specific tools for a full visual effect. Distressed areas utilize fraying and hanging techniques to achieve a natural worn effect through physical abrasion on the edges. High-temperature steam and sandpaper are used to remove fiber lint and color discrepancies, presenting unique distressed and worn effects on the jeans. Sizes: 28-30-32-34 28: Waist 72, Hip 96, Length 107 30: Waist 76, Hip 100, Length 108 32: Waist 80, Hip 104, Length 109 34: Waist 84, Hip 108, Length 110
